title: TrustForge Transport Binding
description: Describes the underlying transport a TrustForge session is currently bound to. Used for session migration (TF-0003) and for relay path policy decisions.

binding_version.description: Version of the transport-binding schema itself.

endpoint.description: Transport-specific endpoint (URL, COM port, BLE peripheral name, ...).

exporter_key.description: Optional base64 of the TLS / QUIC exporter-keying-material output that binds this session to the underlying transport handshake.

peer_cert_fingerprint.description: Optional SHA-256 fingerprint of the peer's TLS certificate, in hex.

tls_alpn.description: Negotiated ALPN identifier when the transport is TLS-bearing.
